title: Enrolling in a MarineNet course
body: Students self-enroll from the course catalog. Click 'Enroll' on a course tile, accept the academic-honesty banner, and the course appears in 'My Courses'. SSO via Keycloak — no separate login. ABAC checks happen at the gateway, not in the browser — clear cache rarely helps.
embed_text:
[LMS] Enrolling in a MarineNet course
Students self-enroll from the course catalog. Click 'Enroll' on a course tile, accept the academic-honesty banner, and the course appears in 'My Courses'. SSO via Keycloak — no separate login.
Tags: enroll, course, student

title: Submitting an assignment
body: Open the assignment, click 'Submit', upload your file (PDF/DOCX, 25 MB max). The system stamps the SSO identity from Keycloak. Late submissions are flagged in the gradebook with a yellow chevron. ABAC checks happen at the gateway, not in the browser — clear cache rarely helps.
embed_text:
[LMS] Submitting an assignment
Open the assignment, click 'Submit', upload your file (PDF/DOCX, 25 MB max). The system stamps the SSO identity from Keycloak. Late submissions are flagged in the gradebook with a yellow chevron.
Tags: assignment, submit

title: Viewing your transcript
body: Self-service transcripts are under Profile → Transcript. Export as PDF for promotion boards. Other Marines' transcripts are NOT visible to students — that's an instructor-or-above permission. Common pitfalls: SSO token timeouts, mis-scoped unit_scope claim, expired CAC.
embed_text:
[LMS] Viewing your transcript
Self-service transcripts are under Profile → Transcript. Export as PDF for promotion boards. Other Marines' transcripts are NOT visible to students — that's an instructor-or-above permission.
Tags: transcript, self

title: Resetting a forgotten password
body: Password reset is delegated to Keycloak. Click 'Forgot password' on the login page and follow the email link. CAC users do NOT have a password to reset — re-insert the CAC and refresh. If you see 'Not authorized', verify your role assignment for this app in Keycloak.
embed_text:
[LMS] Resetting a forgotten password
Password reset is delegated to Keycloak. Click 'Forgot password' on the login page and follow the email link. CAC users do NOT have a password to reset — re-insert the CAC and refresh.
Tags: password, auth, sso

title: Course completion certificates
body: On 100% completion the system auto-issues a PDF certificate with the SSO-stamped name and EDIPI. Certificates are stored under Profile → Certificates and synced nightly to MOL. Operator tip: check Keycloak audit log if access fails unexpectedly.
embed_text:
[LMS] Course completion certificates
On 100% completion the system auto-issues a PDF certificate with the SSO-stamped name and EDIPI. Certificates are stored under Profile → Certificates and synced nightly to MOL.
Tags: cert, completion

title: Creating a course (instructor)
body: Instructors click '+ New Course' from the Instructor Dashboard. Fields: title, summary, target audience (rank/MOS), classification (UNCLASS/CUI), enrollment policy (open/invite-only/unit-scoped). CUI courses require an approver from O-3 or above. For escalations, file a TECOM service request with the SSO request-id.
embed_text:
[LMS] Creating a course (instructor)
Instructors click '+ New Course' from the Instructor Dashboard. Fields: title, summary, target audience (rank/MOS), classification (UNCLASS/CUI), enrollment policy (open/invite-only/unit-scoped). CUI courses require an approver from O-3 or above.
Tags: course, create, instructor

title: Grading rubric configuration
body: Instructors define a rubric per assignment with weighted criteria. Rubric scores feed the gradebook, which is visible to instructors-and-above for their unit scope only. For escalations, file a TECOM service request with the SSO request-id.
embed_text:
[LMS] Grading rubric configuration
Instructors define a rubric per assignment with weighted criteria. Rubric scores feed the gradebook, which is visible to instructors-and-above for their unit scope only.
Tags: grading, rubric, instructor

title: Bulk-assigning a course to a unit
body: Instructors can bulk-assign a course to all Marines in their unit_scope. The Keycloak ABAC tag controls which roster the assign-to picker exposes. Operator tip: check Keycloak audit log if access fails unexpectedly.
embed_text:
[LMS] Bulk-assigning a course to a unit
Instructors can bulk-assign a course to all Marines in their unit_scope. The Keycloak ABAC tag controls which roster the assign-to picker exposes.
Tags: assign, unit

title: Battalion-level transcript reporting
body: Battalion S-3s pull aggregate transcript reports (completion %, avg score, overdue count) for any course assigned inside their unit_scope. Export to CSV or push to GCSS-MC for readiness rollups. If you see 'Not authorized', verify your role assignment for this app in Keycloak.
embed_text:
[LMS] Battalion-level transcript reporting
Battalion S-3s pull aggregate transcript reports (completion %, avg score, overdue count) for any course assigned inside their unit_scope. Export to CSV or push to GCSS-MC for readiness rollups.
Tags: report, transcript, battalion

title: Approving a CUI course for publication
body: S-3 approvers see a 'Pending Approval' queue. Each course pending publication shows author, classification, target unit, and a one-click approve/reject. Rejection prompts a comment field that returns to the author. ABAC checks happen at the gateway, not in the browser — clear cache rarely helps.
embed_text:
[LMS] Approving a CUI course for publication
S-3 approvers see a 'Pending Approval' queue. Each course pending publication shows author, classification, target unit, and a one-click approve/reject. Rejection prompts a comment field that returns to the author.
Tags: approve, publish

title: Delegated authoring for contractors
body: Vendor authors (e.g. SETA contractors) can create draft courses but cannot publish. All vendor-authored content is stamped 'DRAFT — VENDOR' and routes to a uniformed approver. If you see 'Not authorized', verify your role assignment for this app in Keycloak.
embed_text:
[LMS] Delegated authoring for contractors
Vendor authors (e.g. SETA contractors) can create draft courses but cannot publish. All vendor-authored content is stamped 'DRAFT — VENDOR' and routes to a uniformed approver.
Tags: vendor, draft, author

title: Vendor identity boundary
body: Vendor accounts are provisioned in a separate Keycloak realm. They never see CUI courses, transcripts of uniformed Marines, or unit roster data. Attempts surface a 'Not Authorized — vendor scope' banner. Operator tip: check Keycloak audit log if access fails unexpectedly.
embed_text:
[LMS] Vendor identity boundary
Vendor accounts are provisioned in a separate Keycloak realm. They never see CUI courses, transcripts of uniformed Marines, or unit roster data. Attempts surface a 'Not Authorized — vendor scope' banner.
Tags: vendor, boundary, abac

title: Recovering a deleted course
body: Soft-deleted courses live in the trash for 30 days. Only managers can restore. After 30 days, content is purged from primary storage but a manifest is retained in the audit log. For escalations, file a TECOM service request with the SSO request-id.
embed_text:
[LMS] Recovering a deleted course
Soft-deleted courses live in the trash for 30 days. Only managers can restore. After 30 days, content is purged from primary storage but a manifest is retained in the audit log.
Tags: delete, restore

title: API integration with GCSS-MC
body: The LMS publishes a course-completion webhook (JSON, mTLS) to GCSS-MC's readiness service. Webhook secret rotates quarterly via the Keycloak admin console. If you see 'Not authorized', verify your role assignment for this app in Keycloak.
embed_text:
[LMS] API integration with GCSS-MC
The LMS publishes a course-completion webhook (JSON, mTLS) to GCSS-MC's readiness service. Webhook secret rotates quarterly via the Keycloak admin console.
Tags: api, gcss, integration

title: Mobile app — offline course play
body: The MarineNet mobile app caches enrolled courses for 14 days of offline play. Quiz answers sync on next handshake. Offline mode is disabled for CUI courses. ABAC checks happen at the gateway, not in the browser — clear cache rarely helps.
embed_text:
[LMS] Mobile app — offline course play
The MarineNet mobile app caches enrolled courses for 14 days of offline play. Quiz answers sync on next handshake. Offline mode is disabled for CUI courses.
Tags: mobile, offline

title: Accessibility settings (508)
body: Closed captions, screen-reader navigation, and high-contrast mode are toggled per-user in Profile → Accessibility. All courses are validated against Section 508 before publication. Operator tip: check Keycloak audit log if access fails unexpectedly.
embed_text:
[LMS] Accessibility settings (508)
Closed captions, screen-reader navigation, and high-contrast mode are toggled per-user in Profile → Accessibility. All courses are validated against Section 508 before publication.
Tags: accessibility, 508

title: Quizzes and proctoring
body: Instructors can mark a quiz as 'proctored', which forces the BBB integration to start a moderated session before the quiz unlocks. The session recording is retained per the course classification's policy. ABAC checks happen at the gateway, not in the browser — clear cache rarely helps.
embed_text:
[LMS] Quizzes and proctoring
Instructors can mark a quiz as 'proctored', which forces the BBB integration to start a moderated session before the quiz unlocks. The session recording is retained per the course classification's policy.
Tags: quiz, proctoring, bbb

title: Promotion-eligibility courses
body: Promotion gates are tagged 'PROM-ELIG' on the course tile. The completion event publishes a structured record to MOL nightly. Only the Marine and their chain-of-command (within unit_scope) can view the record. Common pitfalls: SSO token timeouts, mis-scoped unit_scope claim, expired CAC.
embed_text:
[LMS] Promotion-eligibility courses
Promotion gates are tagged 'PROM-ELIG' on the course tile. The completion event publishes a structured record to MOL nightly. Only the Marine and their chain-of-command (within unit_scope) can view the record.
Tags: promotion, mol

title: Public-facing pages
body: The CMS hosts the public homepage, news feed, and external announcements. Anyone with a session — including unauthenticated visitors — can read the public namespace. Operator tip: check Keycloak audit log if access fails unexpectedly.
embed_text:
[CMS] Public-facing pages
The CMS hosts the public homepage, news feed, and external announcements. Anyone with a session — including unauthenticated visitors — can read the public namespace.
Tags: public, page

title: Editing a unit page
body: Authors edit pages in their unit_scope. The WYSIWYG inserts SSO-stamped author metadata. Publish requires an Approver role at the battalion level for any page tagged CUI. If you see 'Not authorized', verify your role assignment for this app in Keycloak.
embed_text:
[CMS] Editing a unit page
Authors edit pages in their unit_scope. The WYSIWYG inserts SSO-stamped author metadata. Publish requires an Approver role at the battalion level for any page tagged CUI.
Tags: edit, page, author

title: Publishing a battalion announcement
body: Battalion S-3s publish unit-wide announcements that surface on the unit homepage and push a Keycloak-bound notification to in-scope Marines. For escalations, file a TECOM service request with the SSO request-id.
embed_text:
[CMS] Publishing a battalion announcement
Battalion S-3s publish unit-wide announcements that surface on the unit homepage and push a Keycloak-bound notification to in-scope Marines.
Tags: publish, announcement, battalion

title: Page version history
body: Every save is versioned. Authors can diff versions; Approvers can roll back. A rollback emits an audit log line to Keycloak's audit store. If you see 'Not authorized', verify your role assignment for this app in Keycloak.
embed_text:
[CMS] Page version history
Every save is versioned. Authors can diff versions; Approvers can roll back. A rollback emits an audit log line to Keycloak's audit store.
Tags: versioning, history

title: Embedded BBB sessions on a page
body: Pages can embed a live BBB room as an iframe. The room inherits the page's classification — embedding a CUI BBB room on a public page is rejected by the publish guard. Operator tip: check Keycloak audit log if access fails unexpectedly.
embed_text:
[CMS] Embedded BBB sessions on a page
Pages can embed a live BBB room as an iframe. The room inherits the page's classification — embedding a CUI BBB room on a public page is rejected by the publish guard.
Tags: embed, bbb, page

title: Image gallery upload
body: Authors upload up to 50 images per page. Images are virus-scanned by the perimeter scanner; CUI images get an additional EXIF-strip pass. For escalations, file a TECOM service request with the SSO request-id.
embed_text:
[CMS] Image gallery upload
Authors upload up to 50 images per page. Images are virus-scanned by the perimeter scanner; CUI images get an additional EXIF-strip pass.
Tags: image, upload

title: Search index re-build
body: The CMS search index re-builds nightly. Managers can trigger an on-demand rebuild from the admin tools panel. Public visitors see only the public-namespace facet. If you see 'Not authorized', verify your role assignment for this app in Keycloak.
embed_text:
[CMS] Search index re-build
The CMS search index re-builds nightly. Managers can trigger an on-demand rebuild from the admin tools panel. Public visitors see only the public-namespace facet.
Tags: search, index

title: Vendor portal pages
body: Vendor-facing pages live in a dedicated namespace with no CUI classification permitted. Uniformed Marines edit them via a 'Vendor Liaison' role; vendors view-only. Operator tip: check Keycloak audit log if access fails unexpectedly.
embed_text:
[CMS] Vendor portal pages
Vendor-facing pages live in a dedicated namespace with no CUI classification permitted. Uniformed Marines edit them via a 'Vendor Liaison' role; vendors view-only.
Tags: vendor, portal

title: Page classification guard
body: When an author drops content tagged CUI (via the classification toolbar) into a public-namespace page, the system blocks save and surfaces a red banner: 'CUI content cannot be saved in a public namespace.' For escalations, file a TECOM service request with the SSO request-id.
embed_text:
[CMS] Page classification guard
When an author drops content tagged CUI (via the classification toolbar) into a public-namespace page, the system blocks save and surfaces a red banner: 'CUI content cannot be saved in a public namespace.'
Tags: classification, guard

title: RSS feed for unit news
body: Each unit page exposes an RSS feed scoped to that unit. Subscribers must present a Keycloak token; anonymous RSS clients receive only the public namespace. Operator tip: check Keycloak audit log if access fails unexpectedly.
embed_text:
[CMS] RSS feed for unit news
Each unit page exposes an RSS feed scoped to that unit. Subscribers must present a Keycloak token; anonymous RSS clients receive only the public namespace.
Tags: rss, feed

title: Restoring a deleted page
body: Approvers can restore deleted pages within 90 days. After 90 days the page is purged from primary storage; a manifest stays in audit. For escalations, file a TECOM service request with the SSO request-id.
embed_text:
[CMS] Restoring a deleted page
Approvers can restore deleted pages within 90 days. After 90 days the page is purged from primary storage; a manifest stays in audit.
Tags: restore, delete

title: Page review workflow
body: Authors submit pages for review. Approvers see a pending queue with diff view; comments thread inline. Approval triggers publish; rejection returns to draft. Operator tip: check Keycloak audit log if access fails unexpectedly.
embed_text:
[CMS] Page review workflow
Authors submit pages for review. Approvers see a pending queue with diff view; comments thread inline. Approval triggers publish; rejection returns to draft.
Tags: review, workflow

title: External-link warnings
body: Links to non-.mil/.gov domains automatically render with an 'external link' interstitial. Authors can mark vetted vendor URLs as exempt. Common pitfalls: SSO token timeouts, mis-scoped unit_scope claim, expired CAC.
embed_text:
[CMS] External-link warnings
Links to non-.mil/.gov domains automatically render with an 'external link' interstitial. Authors can mark vetted vendor URLs as exempt.
Tags: external, link

title: Tag taxonomy
body: Pages carry tags for cross-reference. The taxonomy is curated by Approvers; vendors and viewers cannot create tags. Operator tip: check Keycloak audit log if access fails unexpectedly.
embed_text:
[CMS] Tag taxonomy
Pages carry tags for cross-reference. The taxonomy is curated by Approvers; vendors and viewers cannot create tags.
Tags: taxonomy, tags

title: Joining a meeting from an invite
body: Click the meeting link in your email or calendar. The room loads via SSO — no separate password. If you're not on the invite list and the room is unit-scoped, you'll see 'Not authorized for this room.' Common pitfalls: SSO token timeouts, mis-scoped unit_scope claim, expired CAC.
embed_text:
[BBB] Joining a meeting from an invite
Click the meeting link in your email or calendar. The room loads via SSO — no separate password. If you're not on the invite list and the room is unit-scoped, you'll see 'Not authorized for this room.'
Tags: join, meeting

title: Creating a unit meeting
body: Moderators create meetings from the BBB dashboard. Required: title, classification (UNCLASS/CUI), invite list (people-picker is unit_scope-bound). Operator tip: check Keycloak audit log if access fails unexpectedly.
embed_text:
[BBB] Creating a unit meeting
Moderators create meetings from the BBB dashboard. Required: title, classification (UNCLASS/CUI), invite list (people-picker is unit_scope-bound).
Tags: create, meeting, moderator

title: Recording a session
body: Hosts (Capt+) can record. Recording is announced in-room with a banner. Recordings inherit the meeting classification and retention policy. If you see 'Not authorized', verify your role assignment for this app in Keycloak.
embed_text:
[BBB] Recording a session
Hosts (Capt+) can record. Recording is announced in-room with a banner. Recordings inherit the meeting classification and retention policy.
Tags: record, host

title: Battalion-wide town hall
body: Hosts can convene battalion-wide town halls. The invite list auto-populates from the Keycloak unit_scope membership. Attendance is logged for the after-action. ABAC checks happen at the gateway, not in the browser — clear cache rarely helps.
embed_text:
[BBB] Battalion-wide town hall
Hosts can convene battalion-wide town halls. The invite list auto-populates from the Keycloak unit_scope membership. Attendance is logged for the after-action.
Tags: town-hall, battalion

title: Breakout rooms
body: Moderators split a meeting into breakout rooms (max 10). Breakout chat is captured into the parent transcript; ABAC inherits from the parent room. Common pitfalls: SSO token timeouts, mis-scoped unit_scope claim, expired CAC.
embed_text:
[BBB] Breakout rooms
Moderators split a meeting into breakout rooms (max 10). Breakout chat is captured into the parent transcript; ABAC inherits from the parent room.
Tags: breakout

title: Polling and quizzes
body: Moderators can run polls inline. Results are anonymized to participants; moderators see attributed results with SSO identity. Common pitfalls: SSO token timeouts, mis-scoped unit_scope claim, expired CAC.
embed_text:
[BBB] Polling and quizzes
Moderators can run polls inline. Results are anonymized to participants; moderators see attributed results with SSO identity.
Tags: poll, quiz

title: Screen sharing
body: Any participant can request screen share; the moderator approves. CUI-marked rooms watermark the shared screen with the SSO identity of the sharer. If you see 'Not authorized', verify your role assignment for this app in Keycloak.
embed_text:
[BBB] Screen sharing
Any participant can request screen share; the moderator approves. CUI-marked rooms watermark the shared screen with the SSO identity of the sharer.
Tags: screen-share

title: Closed captions
body: Live closed captioning is opt-in per meeting. Captions are auto-generated by an on-prem ASR model (no cloud). Saved transcripts inherit the meeting's classification. If you see 'Not authorized', verify your role assignment for this app in Keycloak.
embed_text:
[BBB] Closed captions
Live closed captioning is opt-in per meeting. Captions are auto-generated by an on-prem ASR model (no cloud). Saved transcripts inherit the meeting's classification.
Tags: captions, asr

title: External / vendor invites
body: Vendor accounts can join meetings only via explicit invite. The invite must be issued by a moderator inside the vendor's unit_scope. Vendors cannot create meetings. Operator tip: check Keycloak audit log if access fails unexpectedly.
embed_text:
[BBB] External / vendor invites
Vendor accounts can join meetings only via explicit invite. The invite must be issued by a moderator inside the vendor's unit_scope. Vendors cannot create meetings.
Tags: vendor, invite

title: End-of-meeting after-action
body: On meeting end, the system emits an after-action JSON to the unit's CMS page (transcript link, attendance, polls). After-action visibility inherits the room classification. For escalations, file a TECOM service request with the SSO request-id.
embed_text:
[BBB] End-of-meeting after-action
On meeting end, the system emits an after-action JSON to the unit's CMS page (transcript link, attendance, polls). After-action visibility inherits the room classification.
Tags: after-action

title: Recording retention
body: UNCLASS recordings retain 90 days; CUI recordings retain 1 year per the records-management policy. Hosts cannot extend retention without an Approver override. Operator tip: check Keycloak audit log if access fails unexpectedly.
embed_text:
[BBB] Recording retention
UNCLASS recordings retain 90 days; CUI recordings retain 1 year per the records-management policy. Hosts cannot extend retention without an Approver override.
Tags: retention, records

title: Meeting access logs
body: Auditors (Capt+) can pull access logs for any meeting in their unit_scope. Logs include join/leave times, SSO identity, and IP-class (CONUS / OCONUS / VPN). If you see 'Not authorized', verify your role assignment for this app in Keycloak.
embed_text:
[BBB] Meeting access logs
Auditors (Capt+) can pull access logs for any meeting in their unit_scope. Logs include join/leave times, SSO identity, and IP-class (CONUS / OCONUS / VPN).
Tags: audit, logs

title: Mobile join
body: iOS/Android clients support join + audio. Recording from mobile is disabled. CAC-on-mobile (via derived credential) is supported. If you see 'Not authorized', verify your role assignment for this app in Keycloak.
embed_text:
[BBB] Mobile join
iOS/Android clients support join + audio. Recording from mobile is disabled. CAC-on-mobile (via derived credential) is supported.
Tags: mobile

title: Bandwidth-aware fallback
body: When a participant's bandwidth drops below 256 kbps, the client auto-falls back to audio-only. CUI rooms display a banner if any participant is on degraded connection. For escalations, file a TECOM service request with the SSO request-id.
embed_text:
[BBB] Bandwidth-aware fallback
When a participant's bandwidth drops below 256 kbps, the client auto-falls back to audio-only. CUI rooms display a banner if any participant is on degraded connection.
Tags: bandwidth, audio

title: Logging in with CAC
body: Insert your CAC, click 'Sign in with CAC' on the SSO portal. The IdP validates the certificate against DoD PKI and issues a session token. CAC PIN is collected by the local middleware, never the browser. If you see 'Not authorized', verify your role assignment for this app in Keycloak.
embed_text:
[Keycloak] Logging in with CAC
Insert your CAC, click 'Sign in with CAC' on the SSO portal. The IdP validates the certificate against DoD PKI and issues a session token. CAC PIN is collected by the local middleware, never the browser.
Tags: cac, login

title: MFA enrollment
body: Non-CAC accounts (e.g. vendor) must enroll MFA on first login. Supported: TOTP (authenticator app), WebAuthn hardware key. SMS is NOT permitted. ABAC checks happen at the gateway, not in the browser — clear cache rarely helps.
embed_text:
[Keycloak] MFA enrollment
Non-CAC accounts (e.g. vendor) must enroll MFA on first login. Supported: TOTP (authenticator app), WebAuthn hardware key. SMS is NOT permitted.
Tags: mfa

title: Role assignment (operator)
body: Operators assign roles inside their unit_scope only. The role picker greys out roles outside the operator's authority. All assignments are audit-logged. For escalations, file a TECOM service request with the SSO request-id.
embed_text:
[Keycloak] Role assignment (operator)
Operators assign roles inside their unit_scope only. The role picker greys out roles outside the operator's authority. All assignments are audit-logged.
Tags: roles

title: ABAC attribute model
body: Each user carries: max_class (UNCLASS/CUI/SECRET), unit_scope (list of org tags), and audit_groups. Apps consume these via the OIDC userinfo claim. Common pitfalls: SSO token timeouts, mis-scoped unit_scope claim, expired CAC.
embed_text:
[Keycloak] ABAC attribute model
Each user carries: max_class (UNCLASS/CUI/SECRET), unit_scope (list of org tags), and audit_groups. Apps consume these via the OIDC userinfo claim.
Tags: abac, claims

title: Auditor view of unit users
body: Auditors (Capt+) can list users inside their unit_scope and view their last login, MFA status, and assigned roles per app. Auditors cannot reset passwords or change roles. Common pitfalls: SSO token timeouts, mis-scoped unit_scope claim, expired CAC.
embed_text:
[Keycloak] Auditor view of unit users
Auditors (Capt+) can list users inside their unit_scope and view their last login, MFA status, and assigned roles per app. Auditors cannot reset passwords or change roles.
Tags: audit, users

title: Realm separation — vendor vs uniformed
body: Vendor accounts live in the 'vendor' realm; uniformed Marines in the 'usmc' realm. Cross-realm token issuance is blocked at the gateway. This is the bedrock of vendor data containment. For escalations, file a TECOM service request with the SSO request-id.
embed_text:
[Keycloak] Realm separation — vendor vs uniformed
Vendor accounts live in the 'vendor' realm; uniformed Marines in the 'usmc' realm. Cross-realm token issuance is blocked at the gateway. This is the bedrock of vendor data containment.
Tags: realm, vendor

title: Session timeout
body: UNCLASS sessions expire after 8 hours of activity, 30 minutes of idle. CUI sessions: 4 hours active, 15 minutes idle. Step-up auth required to re-elevate. ABAC checks happen at the gateway, not in the browser — clear cache rarely helps.
embed_text:
[Keycloak] Session timeout
UNCLASS sessions expire after 8 hours of activity, 30 minutes of idle. CUI sessions: 4 hours active, 15 minutes idle. Step-up auth required to re-elevate.
Tags: session

title: Step-up authentication
body: Sensitive actions (publish CUI page, approve course, export audit log) trigger a step-up: re-tap CAC or re-prove WebAuthn. The IdP records the step-up event with the action descriptor. Common pitfalls: SSO token timeouts, mis-scoped unit_scope claim, expired CAC.
embed_text:
[Keycloak] Step-up authentication
Sensitive actions (publish CUI page, approve course, export audit log) trigger a step-up: re-tap CAC or re-prove WebAuthn. The IdP records the step-up event with the action descriptor.
Tags: step-up

title: Service account management
body: Service accounts (machine-to-machine) are provisioned by Operators with a renewable client-credentials grant. Secrets rotate every 90 days; auto-rotation hooks publish the new secret to HashiCorp Vault. ABAC checks happen at the gateway, not in the browser — clear cache rarely helps.
embed_text:
[Keycloak] Service account management
Service accounts (machine-to-machine) are provisioned by Operators with a renewable client-credentials grant. Secrets rotate every 90 days; auto-rotation hooks publish the new secret to HashiCorp Vault.
Tags: service-account

title: Audit log search
body: Auditors search audit logs by user, action, time range, and IP-class. Logs are immutable for 7 years (NARA records schedule). If you see 'Not authorized', verify your role assignment for this app in Keycloak.
embed_text:
[Keycloak] Audit log search
Auditors search audit logs by user, action, time range, and IP-class. Logs are immutable for 7 years (NARA records schedule).
Tags: audit, log

title: Group-based access control
body: Groups represent units (e.g. '2/1', 'I-MEF', '1st-MLG'). Group membership populates the unit_scope claim. Groups nest — a Marine in '2/1' inherits I-MEF visibility for downstream apps. For escalations, file a TECOM service request with the SSO request-id.
embed_text:
[Keycloak] Group-based access control
Groups represent units (e.g. '2/1', 'I-MEF', '1st-MLG'). Group membership populates the unit_scope claim. Groups nest — a Marine in '2/1' inherits I-MEF visibility for downstream apps.
Tags: groups, rbac

title: Federated login from partner nation
body: Allied/coalition partners can federate via SAML from their own IdP. The federation is whitelisted at the realm level and capped at UNCLASS. ABAC checks happen at the gateway, not in the browser — clear cache rarely helps.
embed_text:
[Keycloak] Federated login from partner nation
Allied/coalition partners can federate via SAML from their own IdP. The federation is whitelisted at the realm level and capped at UNCLASS.
Tags: federation, saml

title: Account deactivation on PCS / EAS
body: On PCS or EAS the personnel system pushes a status change. Keycloak deactivates the account on EAS; on PCS, group memberships are remapped to the gaining unit. ABAC checks happen at the gateway, not in the browser — clear cache rarely helps.
embed_text:
[Keycloak] Account deactivation on PCS / EAS
On PCS or EAS the personnel system pushes a status change. Keycloak deactivates the account on EAS; on PCS, group memberships are remapped to the gaining unit.
Tags: pcs, eas

title: Admin console — emergency lockout
body: In an incident, an Operator can force-logout an entire group with a single command. The action is one-step but requires the operator's step-up auth and pages the on-call SOC. For escalations, file a TECOM service request with the SSO request-id.
embed_text:
[Keycloak] Admin console — emergency lockout
In an incident, an Operator can force-logout an entire group with a single command. The action is one-step but requires the operator's step-up auth and pages the on-call SOC.
Tags: incident, lockout
